title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at UPS India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at UPS India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at UPS India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About UPS India:
UPS India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UPS India!
